PAYMENT_LINK_SETTINGS.TITLE: Payment Link Settings
PAYMENT_LINK_SETTINGS.DESCRIPTION: Configure default options and notifications for payment links.

DEFAULT_PROVIDER.TITLE: Default Payment Provider
DEFAULT_PROVIDER.DESCRIPTION: Select the default payment provider for new payment links.
DEFAULT_PROVIDER.NO_PROVIDER_NOTE: Without a default provider, agents will need to select a provider each time they create a payment link.

DEFAULT_CURRENCY.TITLE: Default Currency
DEFAULT_CURRENCY.DESCRIPTION: Select the default currency for new payment links.

NOTIFICATION_EMAIL.TITLE: Payment Notification Email
NOTIFICATION_EMAIL.DESCRIPTION: Enter email addresses (comma-separated) to receive a notification when a payment link is paid. Leave empty to disable.

API.ERROR: Failed to update payment link settings. Please try again.
